revision.comment:
[[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{| class="navbox collapsible collapsed" style="width:auto; clear:none; font-size:1em;" ! style="width:70em;" |
 
{{{1...'
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/124.186.162.80|124.186.162.80]] ([[User talk:124.186.162.80|talk]]) to last version by CapitalR
add name parameter to make v d e links work correctly when template is used
being bold; removing confusing VDE bar and changing color to not look like a navbox (since this really isn't a navbox)
allow for template to be collapsed, move lang to /doc
changed default to collapsed per [[Template talk:Ahnentafel top/Requested Comments 1]]
Changed protection level of Template:Ahnentafel top: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
add per request, can change the default from none to both if there is some unforeseen issue
Wrap around {{Ahnentafel top}} to preform the same function for the output of the [[template:chart]]
revision.text: {{Ahnentafel top|{{{1|Family of {{PAGENAME}}<!-- -->}}}<!-- -->}}|<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Simpler just to copy the whole template from [[template:Ahnentafel top]]
fix bug in the template so that collapsed=no works as described
Altered script so that collapsed=no works as documented
fix for mobile per talk page
{{{style|}}} to allow more styles to be added

updated using script copied from [[Template:Ahnentafel top]] one minor change from "Ancestors of" to "Family of". This fixes the problem of not displaying on mobile devices see [[template:Chart]] talk page

Protected "[[Template:Chart top]]": [[WP:SEMI|semi-protecting]] highly-visible templates in response to recent template-space vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (ind...
add optional text-align for [[Guillaume, Hereditary Grand Duke of Luxembourg]] and others
Per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2018 March 21#Template:Ahnentafel-compact4]], added {{being deleted}} ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2018 March 21|Template:Ahnentafel-compact4|merge=Template:Ahnentafel}}</noinclude>{| class="collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{collapsed|}}}|no|expanded|collapsed}}" style="{{#switch:{{{align|}}}{{{float|}}}
 | left = margin: 0.3em 0 0.3em 1em; float:left; clear:{{{clear|left}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | right = margin: 0.3em 1em 0.3em 1em; float:right; clear:{{{clear|right}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | #default = margin: 0.3em auto auto; clear:{{{clear|none}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|70em}}}}}};
 }} width:{{{width|auto}}}; font-size:88%; border:1px solid #aaa;"
! style="padding:0.2em 0.3em 0.2em 4.3em;background:none; width:{{{width|auto}}}" | {{{1|Ancestors of {{PAGENAME}}}}}
|-
| style="text-align:{{{text-align|center}}}" | <noinclude>
|}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Plastikspork moved page [[Template:Ahnentafel top]] to [[Template:Chart top]]: History merge
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2018 March 21|Template:Ahnentafel-compact4|merge=Template:Ahnentafel}}</noinclude>{| class="collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{collapsed|}}}|no|expanded|collapsed}}" style="{{#switch:{{{align|}}}{{{float|}}}
 | left = margin: 0.3em 0 0.3em 1em; float:left; clear:{{{clear|left}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | right = margin: 0.3em 1em 0.3em 1em; float:right; clear:{{{clear|right}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | #default = margin: 0.3em auto auto; clear:{{{clear|none}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|70em}}}}}};
 }} width:{{{width|auto}}}; font-size:88%; border:1px solid #aaa;"
! style="padding:0.2em 0.3em 0.2em 4.3em;background:none; width:{{{width|auto}}}" | {{{1|Ancestors of {{PAGENAME}}}}}
|-
| style="text-align:{{{text-align|center}}}" | <noinclude>
|}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: derp; meant to do that in the sandbox version

This cannot auto-collapse by default, per [[MOS:DONTHIDE]]. It should never be auto-collapsed on purpose in mainspace with this parameter, either, for the same reason. Collapsing stuff is potentially less objectionable in other namespaces. See also [[MOS:ACCESS]] for usability and accessibility issues. And use [[Template:Yesno-no]], to interpret values like "Y", "false", etc. Also permit "collapse" not just "collapsed".
minor spacing and capitals just for future editors
Fix margin for right aligned, should match left aligned logic
Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using chart top with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: Fixing my edit mistake that put this category on numerous templates it did not belong on
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 2]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-12 02:02:50 on [[Template:Chart top]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/124.186.162.80|124.186.162.80]] ([[User talk:124.186.162.80|talk]]) to last version by CapitalR
add name parameter to make v d e links work correctly when template is used
being bold; removing confusing VDE bar and changing color to not look like a navbox (since this really isn't a navbox)
allow for template to be collapsed, move lang to /doc
changed default to collapsed per [[Template talk:Ahnentafel top/Requested Comments 1]]
add per request, can change the default from none to both if there is some unforeseen issue
Wrap around {{Ahnentafel top}} to preform the same function for the output of the [[template:chart]]
revision.text: {{Ahnentafel top|{{{1|Family of {{PAGENAME}}<!-- -->}}}<!-- -->}}|<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Simpler just to copy the whole template from [[template:Ahnentafel top]]
fix bug in the template so that collapsed=no works as described
Altered script so that collapsed=no works as documented
fix for mobile per talk page
{{{style|}}} to allow more styles to be added

updated using script copied from [[Template:Ahnentafel top]] one minor change from "Ancestors of" to "Family of". This fixes the problem of not displaying on mobile devices see [[template:Chart]] talk page

Protected "[[Template:Chart top]]": [[WP:SEMI|semi-protecting]] highly-visible templates in response to recent template-space vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (ind...
add optional text-align for [[Guillaume, Hereditary Grand Duke of Luxembourg]] and others
Per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2018 March 21#Template:Ahnentafel-compact4]], added {{being deleted}} ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2018 March 21|Template:Ahnentafel-compact4|merge=Template:Ahnentafel}}</noinclude>{| class="collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{collapsed|}}}|no|expanded|collapsed}}" style="{{#switch:{{{align|}}}{{{float|}}}
 | left = margin: 0.3em 0 0.3em 1em; float:left; clear:{{{clear|left}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | right = margin: 0.3em 1em 0.3em 1em; float:right; clear:{{{clear|right}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | #default = margin: 0.3em auto auto; clear:{{{clear|none}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|70em}}}}}};
 }} width:{{{width|auto}}}; font-size:88%; border:1px solid #aaa;"
! style="padding:0.2em 0.3em 0.2em 4.3em;background:none; width:{{{width|auto}}}" | {{{1|Ancestors of {{PAGENAME}}}}}
|-
| style="text-align:{{{text-align|center}}}" | <noinclude>
|}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: This cannot auto-collapse by default, per [[MOS:DONTHIDE]]. It should never be auto-collapsed on purpose in mainspace with this parameter, either, for the same reason. Collapsing stuff is potentially less objectionable in other namespaces. See also [[MOS:ACCESS]] for usability and accessibility issues. And use [[Template:Yesno-no]], to interpret values like "Y", "false", etc. Also permit "collapse" not just "collapsed".
minor spacing and capitals just for future editors
Fix margin for right aligned, should match left aligned logic
Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using chart top with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]

Adding [[Category:qq]]<!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->[[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "<!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23817035935|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chart_top here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chart_top for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{| class="collapsible {{#ifeq:{{Yesno-no|{{{collapsed|{{{collapse|}}}}}}}}|yes|collapsed|expanded}}" style="{{#switch:{{{align|}}}{{{float|}}}
 | left     = margin: 0.3em 1em 0.3em 0; float:left; clear:{{{clear|left}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | right    = margin: 0.3em 0 0.3em 1em; float:right; clear:{{{clear|right}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|33em}}}}}};
 | #default = margin: 0.3em auto auto; clear:{{{clear|none}}}; min-width:{{{min-width|{{{width|60em}}}}}};
 }} width:{{{width|auto}}}; font-size:85%; border:1px solid #aaa"
! style="padding:0.2em 0.3em 0.2em {{#if:{{{template_name|}}}|0.3em|4.3em}};{{#if:{{{background|}}}|background:{{{background|}}}; color: black|background:none; color: inherit}}; width:{{{width|auto}}}" | {{#if:{{{template_name|}}}
 |{{Navbar-collapsible|{{{title|{{{1|Family of {{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{template_name}}}}}
 |{{{title|{{{1|Family of {{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}
 }}
|-
| style="text-align:{{{text-align|center}}}" | {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[:en:Category:Pages using chart top with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[|preview=Page using [[Template:Chart top]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | align | background | clear | collapse | collapsed | float | min-width | template_name | text-align | title | width }}<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
